case_title: TONYA BROWN VS. ISHEAL MARTIN JR

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, TONYA SERVED FEB-21-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN JR, ISHEAL
